title: Traditional Letters to Santa Claus Box - Wooden Xmas Eve List & Card Xmas Mailbox Decoration Father Christmas for Children - Home Farmhouse Style Decor
features: Festive Decor: Bring the magic of Christmas to your home with this charming Santa Clause father Christmas letter box for children. Add a touch of Christmas cheer to your home with this traditional Santa Claus letter box, perfect for children to send their wish lists to the North Pole.

Wooden Construction: Crafted from sturdy wood, this letter box boasts a classic red colour and a charming design featuring Santa Claus himself. With its timeless appeal and nostalgic charm, this piece is sure to become a cherished part of your holiday home decor for years to come.

Novelty Item: A delightful novelty item that will bring joy and excitement to children during the holiday season. Crafted from wood, this traditional novelty decoration features a vibrant red hue reminiscent of Santa's iconic suit and a North Pole letters design, creating a delightful atmosphere for the festive season.

Decorative Piece: Not only functional but also decorative, this letter box can be displayed as part of your Christmas home decor. Dimensions: This letter box is a compact yet eye-catching addition to your festive decorations.
